stdout:
name: machinetwin
services:
  postgres:
    container_name: machinetwin-postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: machinetwin
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: machinetwin
      POSTGRES_USER: machinetwin
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U machinetwin -d machinetwin
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 5s
      retries: 10
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: machinetwin_postgres_data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: machinetwin_default
volumes:
  machinetwin_postgres_data:
    name: machinetwin_machinetwin_postgres_data
